seoTitle: How to Add Payment Details to Your Gumroad Account
metaDescription: See how to add payout details as a Gumroad creator or update your checkout card as a buyer, so your account is ready to send or receive payments.
intro: Gumroad accounts handle payment details differently depending on whether you're receiving earnings as a creator or paying for a purchase as a buyer. This guide covers both directions: setting up a payout method to get paid, and updating your saved card so checkout goes smoothly.

steps.heading: Open your Gumroad settings
steps.body: Go to your account settings and look for the payments or payouts section.

steps.heading: Choose your payout method
steps.body: As a creator, connect a bank account or PayPal so Gumroad knows where to send your earnings.

steps.heading: Update your buyer payment details
steps.body: As a buyer, add or update your card information so future checkouts are quicker.

steps.heading: Verify your identity if required
steps.body: Complete any identity checks Gumroad requests before your payment settings are fully active.

steps.heading: Save your changes
steps.body: Confirm and save your payment details so they're ready the next time you buy or get paid.

faq.question: Do buyers and creators use the same payment settings on Gumroad?
faq.answer: No, buyers manage checkout card details while creators separately set up payout methods to receive earnings.

faq.question: Is it safe to save my card on Gumroad?
faq.answer: Gumroad processes and stores payment information through a secure checkout system.

faq.question: Why is my payment setup asking for identity verification?
faq.answer: Identity verification is often required before payouts can be activated, especially for new creator accounts.

faq.question: Can I change my payout method later?
faq.answer: Yes, you can update your linked bank account or PayPal at any time from your settings.
